title: The Enemy Tries to Regain Control
description: On pages 7–10, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9. The central beat is the enemy tries to regain control.
scene: The scene focuses on the enemy tries to regain control, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...is the only one in the world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: who knows how to produce S.A.D.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Well, I'll slice off an ear then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: fu-fu-fu!! I'm looking forward to it

dialogue.speaker: Monet
dialogue.text: Caesar, Monet, can you hear me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: B-Block is already a sea of fire!!!

summary: The Enemy Tries to Regain Control. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
